title: Part 6 – Entraînement 3 : rapports & documents formels
instructions: Lisez chaque texte et choisissez le mot ou groupe de mots qui convient pour chaque numéro.

items.passage:
PRESS RELEASE

Novatech Solutions is {{1}} to announce the successful completion of its acquisition of DataBridge Analytics.

The acquisition, {{2}} was finalised last Friday, will allow Novatech to expand its data intelligence capabilities and serve clients across twelve additional markets.

"This is a defining moment for our company," said CEO Maria Voss. "Together, we {{3}} offer a level of data insight that neither company could achieve alone."

Full details of the acquisition will be {{4}} in next month's investor report.

questions.explanation: "is pleased to announce" : formule standard de communiqué de presse.
"which" : pronom relatif non restrictif pour une chose ("The acquisition").
Citation directe au futur déclaratif : "we will offer".
Futur passif : "will be disclosed".

items.passage:
EMPLOYEE SURVEY RESULTS — SUMMARY

A total of four hundred and twelve employees {{1}} in this year's annual satisfaction survey, representing a response rate of eighty-three percent.

Overall job satisfaction remains high, with seventy-eight percent of respondents {{2}} either satisfied or very satisfied with their role. The most commonly cited areas for improvement {{3}} work-life balance and career development opportunities.

{{4}} on these findings, the HR team will develop an action plan to be presented at the next all-hands meeting.

questions.explanation: Résultat d'un événement passé et terminé (le sondage annuel) : prétérit "participated".
Participe présent après "with" + complément : "with 78% of respondents reporting".
Résultats du sondage : prétérit "were" pour les réponses données lors de l'enquête.
"Based on these findings" : participe passé en tête de phrase (structure idiomatique).

items.passage:
CONTRACT SUMMARY — SERVICE AGREEMENT

This agreement is entered into between Clearfield Ltd (hereafter referred to as 'the Client') and FastTrack Logistics (hereafter referred to as 'the Provider').

The Provider {{1}} to deliver all shipments within forty-eight hours of collection. In the event of a delay caused by circumstances {{2}} the Provider's control, the Client will be notified within four hours.

This agreement is valid for one year from the date of signing and {{3}} be renewed upon mutual agreement of both parties. Either party may terminate the agreement with thirty days' written notice. {{4}} charges incurred before termination remain payable.

questions.explanation: "The Provider agrees to" : présent simple pour un engagement contractuel.
"beyond the Provider's control" = hors du contrôle du prestataire. Expression figée.
"may be renewed" : possibilité de reconduction (pas d'obligation).
"All charges incurred before termination remain payable" : totalité des frais.

items.passage:
REPORT: Office Energy Consumption — Q3

This report summarises energy consumption data for all company premises during the third quarter.

Overall energy use {{1}} by eleven percent compared to Q2, largely as a result of the installation of LED lighting across all floors. {{2}}, water consumption increased slightly due to the addition of a new coffee machine in each department kitchen.

We recommend {{3}} smart thermostats in meeting rooms and common areas to further reduce heating and cooling costs. The estimated {{4}} period for this investment is fourteen months.

questions.explanation: Fait daté et terminé (Q3) : prétérit "decreased".
"However" : contraste entre la baisse d'énergie et la hausse de la consommation d'eau.
"recommend" + gérondif : "recommend installing".
"payback period" = délai de retour sur investissement. Terme technique courant.

items.passage:
POLICY DOCUMENT: Remote Work Guidelines

This document outlines the company's policy on remote working arrangements, {{1}} from the first of next month.

Employees are eligible to work remotely up to three days per week, subject to {{2}} approval. Remote working days must be agreed with the line manager at least one week in advance and cannot be used on days when in-person attendance is {{3}}.

All employees working remotely must be available during core hours and must ensure their home working environment is {{4}} professional standards.

questions.explanation: "effective from" = en vigueur à partir de. Adjectif dans une formule de politique.
"subject to managerial approval" = sous réserve de l'approbation du responsable.
"when in-person attendance is required" : voix passive adjectivale.
"in line with professional standards" = conforme aux normes professionnelles.

items.passage:
ANNUAL REPORT EXCERPT — CEO MESSAGE

This has been a year of significant progress for our organisation. Revenue {{1}} by fourteen percent to reach a record high of forty-two million euros, while operating costs were kept {{2}} through disciplined budget management.

We also made important strides in our sustainability agenda. Our carbon emissions {{3}} by twenty-two percent, and we are on track to achieve carbon neutrality by 2030.

Looking {{4}}, we will focus on accelerating digital transformation and deepening our client relationships across all regions.

questions.explanation: Résultat annuel terminé : prétérit "grew".
"kept in check" = maîtrisés / sous contrôle. Expression idiomatique.
Voix passive au prétérit pour un fait de l'année écoulée : "were reduced".
"Looking forward" = en regardant vers l'avenir. Expression figée.

items.passage:
HEALTH & SAFETY NOTICE

All employees are reminded that the fire alarm system {{1}} tested on the second Tuesday of each month at ten a.m.

When the alarm sounds during a test, evacuation is not required. {{2}}, if the alarm continues for more than three minutes or is accompanied by a verbal announcement, employees must evacuate {{3}}.

Please ensure you are familiar with the evacuation route from your floor and {{4}} your nearest fire exit is.

questions.explanation: Planification régulière future : "will be tested" chaque mois.
"However" : contraste entre la procédure normale (pas d'évacuation) et l'exception (alarme prolongée).
Adverbe pour modifier "evacuate" : "evacuate immediately".
"know where your nearest fire exit is" : question indirecte avec "where".

items.passage:
TRAINING PROGRAMME OVERVIEW

The Leadership Development Programme is designed for employees {{1}} to advance into senior management roles.

The programme spans six months and includes monthly workshops, one-to-one coaching sessions, and a final project {{2}} participants develop and present a strategic business proposal.

Applicants must have at least three years of management experience and {{3}} recommended by their department head. Applications are reviewed {{4}} and successful candidates will be notified within four weeks.

questions.explanation: Participe présent comme adjectif : "employees looking to advance".
"a final project in which participants develop" : pronom relatif avec préposition.
Condition d'admission parallèle : "must have... and must be recommended".
"reviewed on a rolling basis" = en continu, au fil des candidatures. Terme courant en RH.

items.passage:
NOTICE: Expense Policy Clarification

Following recent questions from staff, the finance team would like to clarify several points regarding the expense reimbursement policy.

Meals during business travel {{1}} reimbursed up to fifty euros per day. This limit applies regardless of {{2}} the meal is for one person or a group, unless a client entertainment form has been submitted.

Receipts must be {{3}} to all claims over twenty-five euros. Claims submitted {{4}} proper documentation will not be processed until the required paperwork is received.

questions.explanation: Règle future dans une note de clarification de politique : "will be reimbursed".
"regardless of whether" : construction standard avec une alternative (one person or a group).
"must be attached" : voix passive modale.
"submitted without proper documentation" : préposition correcte dans ce contexte.

items.passage:
CLIENT NEWSLETTER

Dear valued clients,

We are writing to update you on several {{1}} to our service offering, effective from the first of next quarter.

Our premium support tier {{2}} extended to include twenty-four-hour coverage, seven days a week. In addition, all clients on annual contracts will now have access to a dedicated account manager {{3}} will serve as their main point of contact.

We believe these enhancements reflect our ongoing {{4}} to delivering exceptional service. Please do not hesitate to contact us if you have any questions.

questions.explanation: Nom pluriel après "several" : "several enhancements".
Futur passif annonçant un changement à venir : "will be extended".
"an account manager who will serve" : "who" pour une personne, sujet de la relative.
"our ongoing commitment to" : nom dans une formule d'engagement professionnelle.
